setup.tryIt: Send a direct or group test message from QQ.
setup.summary: QQ uses the official bot credentials and a long WebSocket connection.
steps: Create a bot in QQ Open Platform and copy its App ID and Secret.
Choose the message format and optional sender allowlist.
Save and enable QQ, then send a direct or group test message.

appId.label: App ID
appId.help: Copy it from QQ Open Platform.

secret.label: Secret
secret.help: Save this before leaving the QQ credentials page.
